diagnosis: Atrial flutter with 2:1 conduction. Don't overlook the subtle "extra" atrial wave (it's NOT a true P wave, but a flutter wave) in the early ST segment. Atrial flutter with 2:1 conduction (block) is often mistaken for sinus tachycardia or paroxysmal supraventricular tachycardia (PSVT), as discussed elsewhere in this problem set.
